stem: The equation y = -20x + 130 represents the number of boxes y remaining to be delivered x hours after a delivery truck began its route. The graph of this equation in the xy-plane is a line. What is the best interpretation of the x-intercept in this context?

answerOptions.content: The truck started its route with about 6.5 boxes.
The truck will have delivered all the boxes in 6.5 hours.
The truck delivers about 20 boxes per hour.
The truck started with 130 boxes to deliver.

rationale: Choice B is correct. The x-intercept is where y = 0: 0 = -20x + 130, so x = 6.5. Since y is the number of boxes remaining, x = 6.5 hours is when no boxes remain — all have been delivered. Choice A misreads which axis is which. Choice C describes the slope's magnitude. Choice D describes the y-intercept, not the x-intercept.
